zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Elisabeth Albaum於1620年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德時，她的父親Heinrich Albaum45歲，母親Clara Gillissen42歲。她於1635年與Hans Joachim Schröder在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1672年11月3日在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Elisabeth Albaum于1620年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯文特波格阿爾騰費爾德时，她的父亲Heinrich Albaum45岁，母亲Clara Gillissen42岁。她于1635年与Hans Joachim Schröder在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯史馬倫格波德費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1672年11月3日在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Albaum
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Chaim, Isaak, Avron, Batya, Izak, Jechiel, Shlomo, Shmuel, Yaakov.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Ölbaum ‘olive tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Elisabeth Albaum was born in 1620, in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Heinrich Albaum, was 45 and her mother, Clara Gillissen, was 42. She married Hans Joachim Schröder in 1635, in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 November 1672, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Elisabeth Albaum est née en 1620, à Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich Albaum, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Clara Gillissen, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Hans Joachim Schröder en 1635, à Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1672, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Elisabeth Albaum 1620 in Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich Albaum 45 und ihre Mutter Clara Gillissen 42. Sie hat 1635 in Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Hans Joachim Schröder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. November 1672 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Elisabeth Albaum è nata il nel 1620 nel Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich Albaum, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Clara Gillissen, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Hans Joachim Schröder nel 1635, nel Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 novembre 1672, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Elisabeth Albaumが1620年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスウィンテルバーグアルテンフエルドで生まれた時，父Heinrich Albaumは45歳，母Clara Gillissenは42歳であった。1635年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイススチマレンバーグブoデフエルドでHans Joachim Schröderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1672年11月3日に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.Niedermarsberg, Westfalen, Preussen, Ger: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 브리런 니더마스버그
ko.Altenfeld, Westfalen: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 메슈드 브o데펠드-랜드 알텐펠드
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Elisabeth Albaum(이)가 1620년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 윈터버그 알텐펠드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich Albaum(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clara Gillissen(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1635년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 슈몰버그 브o데펠드에서 Hans Joachim Schröder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1672년 11월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Elisabeth Albaum nasceu em 1620, em Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich Albaum, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Clara Gillissen, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Hans Joachim Schröder em 1635, em Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1672, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Elisabeth Albaum родилась в 1620 г. в местности алтенфелд, винтирбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich Albaum было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Clara Gillissen, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Joachim Schröder в 1635 г. в местности бoдефелд, щмалленбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 ноября 1672 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Elisabeth Albaum nació en 1620, en Altenfeld, Winterberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich Albaum, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Clara Gillissen, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Hans Joachim Schröder en 1635, en Bödefeld, Schmallenberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1672, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
